title:
Lesson 1:
Making plans
description: Using future tense to make plans: '-ecek/-acak', invitations, accepting/declining.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: I'm going to the movies. Do you want to come?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: We're going to go on Saturday.

title:
Lesson 2:
Asking permission
description: '...abilir miyim?/...ebilir miyim?' = Can I...? / May I...? Polite way to ask for permission.

title:
Lesson 3:
Telephone phrases
description: Phone vocabulary: aramak (to call), telefon (phone), mesaj (message), konuşmak (to speak).

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: No, she's not here. Who's speaking?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Do you want to leave a message?

title:
Lesson 4:
Expressing preferences
description: 'Tercih etmek' (to prefer): 'tercih ediyorum' = I prefer. Use with nouns or infinitives.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.turkish: Kahve mi çay mı tercih edersin?
dialogue.english: Do you prefer coffee or tea?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.turkish: Okumayı mı televizyon izlemeyi mi tercih edersin?
dialogue.english: Do you prefer to read or watch television?

title:
Lesson 5:
Asking for opinions
description: Opinion phrases: 'Ne düşünüyorsun?' (What do you think?), 'Fikrin ne?' (What's your opinion?), 'Bence...' (I think that...).

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: What do you think of this movie?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: What's your opinion of the restaurant?

title:
Lesson 8:
Expressing disagreement
description: Disagreement: 'Katılmıyorum' (I don't agree), 'Sanmıyorum' (I don't think so), 'Aksine' (On the contrary).

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Yes, on the contrary, it's very exciting.

title:
Lesson 9:
Making invitations
description: Inviting someone: 'İster misin...?' (Do you want to...?), 'Gelmek ister misin?' (Would you like to come?).

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Do you want to go to the concert?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Yes, I would like to go.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: When do you want to go?

title:
Lesson 10:
Accepting invitations
description: Accepting: 'Tabii!' (Sure!), 'Elbette!' (Of course!), 'Çok isterim' (I would love to), 'Mükemmel!' (Perfect!).

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Do you want to come to my house?

title:
Lesson 11:
Declining invitations
description: Declining politely: 'Üzgünüm' (I'm sorry), 'Gelemem' (I can't), 'Belki başka zaman' (Maybe another day).

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.turkish: Bu gece sinemaya gitmek ister misin?
dialogue.english: Do you want to go to the movies tonight?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: I have to study. Maybe another day.

title:
Lesson 12:
Reactions & What Happened
description: 'Gerçekten mi?' = Really? 'Ciddi misin?' = Are you serious? 'Ne oldu?' = What happened? 'Şaka mı yapıyorsun?' = Are you joking? Use these to react to surprising news.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Listen, they offered me the job.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.turkish: Evet ama bir sorun da var.
dialogue.english: Yes but there's also a problem.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: The salary is half of what I expected.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Are you joking? That can't be!

title:
Lesson 13:
What Are You Doing / Saying
description: 'Ne yapıyorsun?' = What are you doing? 'Ne yapıyordun?' = What were you doing? 'Ne dedin?' = What did you say? These are essential for everyday conversation.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.turkish: Az önce tuhaf bir şey söyledin.
dialogue.english: You said something weird just now.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: What did you say I said?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: What were you usually doing on Sundays?

title:
Lesson 14:
Which / How Are You / Since When
description: 'Hangisi?' = Which one? 'Hangisini seviyorsun?' = Which one do you like? 'Nasılsın?' = How are you? 'Nasıl geçiyor?' = How's it going? 'Ne zamandan beri?' = Since when?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: I'm good, thanks. How is the year going?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Very well. I have a new car.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: Since when do you have a car?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.turkish: Geçen aydan beri. Hangisini seviyorsun, kırmızı mı mavi mi?
dialogue.english: Since last month. Which do you like, red or blue?
